languages.text: "Сейчас Ювенна уже завершила переговоры с Инквизицией, но я лично их слышал, поверьте!"

traits.locale_text: "Сейчас Ювенна уже завершила переговоры с Инквизицией, но я лично их слышал, поверьте!"

languages.text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"
languages.original_text: "Сейчас Ювенна уже завершила переговоры с Инквизицией, но я лично их слышал, поверьте!"

"Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"

languages.text: "Juvenna hat ihr Gespräch mit der Inquisition bereits beendet, aber ich habe sie selbst gehört, glaubt mir!"
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna hat ihr Gespräch mit der Inquisition bereits beendet, aber ich habe sie selbst gehört, glaubt mir!"

languages.text: “尤文娜跟审判庭的谈话已经结束，但我亲耳听到了，相信我！”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜跟审判庭的谈话已经结束，但我亲耳听到了，相信我！”

languages.text: « L'Inquisition a déjà eu une petite discussion avec Juvenna, et j'ai tout entendu, croyez-moi ! »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"

traits.locale_text: « L'Inquisition a déjà eu une petite discussion avec Juvenna, et j'ai tout entendu, croyez-moi ! »

languages.text: «¡Juvenna ya había concluido su conversación con la Inquisición, pero yo {mf|mismo|misma} pude oírlos, se lo aseguro!».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Juvenna ya había concluido su conversación con la Inquisición, pero yo {mf|mismo|misma} pude oírlos, se lo aseguro!».

languages.text: "Juvenna, Engizisyon ile konuştu bile. Bizzat duydum onları, inan bana!"
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"

languages.text: 「ジュベナはすでに宗教裁判所との会話を終えたが、私はその会話を耳にした。信じろ！」
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"
